title: user
content:
# user

This section contains 7 endpoints.

<CardGroup cols={2}>
<Card title="Create user." href="/api-reference/user/post-user">
`POST` /user
</Card>
<Card title="Creates list of users with given input array." href="/api-reference/user/post-user-createWithList">
`POST` /user/createWithList
</Card>
<Card title="Logs user into the system." href="/api-reference/user/get-user-login">
`GET` /user/login
</Card>
<Card title="Logs out current logged in user session." href="/api-reference/user/get-user-logout">
`GET` /user/logout
</Card>
<Card title="Get user by user name." href="/api-reference/user/get-user-username">
`GET` /user/{username}
</Card>
<Card title="Update user resource." href="/api-reference/user/put-user-username">
`PUT` /user/{username}
</Card>
<Card title="Delete user resource." href="/api-reference/user/delete-user-username">
`DELETE` /user/{username}
</Card>
</CardGroup>
